description: The panel discusses the future of virtual machines, focusing on interoperability versus maximalism. Panelists Kyle Samani and Georgios explore the evolution from an Ethereum-dominated ecosystem to a multi-chain future, emphasizing the importance of bridge protocols and security models [t=21:36].
topic_summary: The discussion centers on the contrasting visions of a multi-chain future versus a single dominant chain. Panelists share insights on the current state of blockchain ecosystems and the challenges of interoperability [t=40:38].
